nasb.text: and one sheep from each flock of two hundred from the watering places of Israel—for a grain offering, for a burnt offering and for peace offerings, to make atonement for them,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: And one sheep from every flock of two hundred, from the watering places of Israel for grain offering, burnt offering, and peace offerings, to make atonement for them, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 從以色列肥沃的草場上，每二百隻羊中要獻一隻羊羔。這些供物要作素祭、燔祭和平安祭，為他們贖罪。這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 在以色列肥美的草场上，每二百只羊便要献上一只。这些供物用来作素祭、燔祭和平安祭，为以色列人赎罪。这是主耶和华说的。
